## Runtime.Session.BarTruffleEditingSession class

Editing session for bar truffle confections. Supports linear count-based scaling with proportional filling adjustment.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class BarTruffleEditingSession extends ConfectionEditingSessionBase<IProducedBarTruffle, RuntimeBarTruffle> 
```
**Extends:** ConfectionEditingSessionBase&lt;[IProducedBarTruffle](./ts-chocolate.entities.iproducedbartruffle.md)<!-- -->, [RuntimeBarTruffle](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.runtimebartruffle.md)<!-- -->&gt;

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `BarTruffleEditingSession` class.
